mapper.sql: FROM MEDIA_BATCH mb JOIN MEDIA_ITEMS cover ON cover.media_id = mb.cover_media_id AND cover.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT image_mv ON cover.media_id = image_mv.media_id AND image_mv.variant_type = 'SMALL' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT video_thumb_mv ON cover.media_id = video_thumb_mv.media_id AND video_thumb_mv.variant_type = 'THUMB' LEFT JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT video_preview_mv ON cover.media_id = video_preview_mv.media_id AND video_preview_mv.variant_type = 'PREVIEW' LEFT JOIN USER u ON mb.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ALBUM a ON mb.album_id = a.album_id WHERE mb.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' AND a.del_yn = 'N'

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BATCH_TAG bt JOIN TAG t ON bt.tag_id=t.tag_id WHERE bt.batch_id=mb.batch_id AND t.del_yn='N' AND t.tag_name=#{tag})
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM BATCH_LIKE bl2 WHERE bl2.batch_id = mb.batch_id AND bl2.user_id = #{userId})

mapper.select:
SELECT mb.batch_id AS media_id, cover.media_type, mb.user_id, COALESCE(mb.title, cover.title) AS title, mb.uploaded_at, mb.taken_at, a.album_name, u.display_name, CASE WHEN cover.media_type='VIDEO' THEN video_thumb_mv.storage_key ELSE image_mv.storage_key END AS thumbnail_storage_key, video_preview_mv.storage_key AS preview_storage_key, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_LIKE bl WHERE bl.batch_id = mb.batch_id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT c WHERE c.batch_id = mb.batch_id AND c.del_yn='N') AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_LIKE blm WHERE blm.batch_id = mb.batch_id AND blm.user_id = #{userId}) AS liked_by_me, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(t.tag_scope,'N'),'|',t.tag_name) ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.tag_scope='P' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.tag_name SEPARATOR ',') FROM BATCH_TAG bt JOIN TAG t ON bt.tag_id=t.tag_id WHERE bt.batch_id=mb.batch_id AND t.del_yn='N') AS tags_csv
ORDER BY mb.uploaded_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT mb.batch_id AS media_id, cover.media_type, mb.user_id, COALESCE(mb.title, cover.title) AS title, mb.uploaded_at, mb.taken_at, a.album_name, u.display_name, image_mv.storage_key AS thumbnail_storage_key, NULL AS preview_storage_key, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_LIKE bl WHERE bl.batch_id = mb.batch_id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT c WHERE c.batch_id = mb.batch_id AND c.del_yn='N') AS comment_count, 0 AS liked_by_me, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(t.tag_scope,'N'),'|',t.tag_name) SEPARATOR ',') FROM BATCH_TAG bt JOIN TAG t ON bt.tag_id=t.tag_id WHERE bt.batch_id=mb.batch_id AND t.del_yn='N') AS tags_csv
AND cover.media_type='IMAGE' ORDER BY mb.uploaded_at DESC
